Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents And Things To Deft Otis Elevator, (Set Two); Statement And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rafael Crespo, Jr., Esq. of L/O of Rafael Crespo, Tel. 415.285.2063, for plaintiff and moving party;
Sara K. Egide, Esq. of Tucker Ellis, Tel. 415.617.2219, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: After hearing on PLAINTIFF KRISTOPHER KING's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And Things To Defendant Otis Elevator, (Set Two), the court ruled as follows: The parties are to meet and confer re liability and to submit a stipulation and order by August 20. If no agreement has been reached by then, each party is to submit its own proposed order. Pro Tem Judge: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
